Judith Brottrager

Computational Literary Studies

stylcoR is now available

by Judith Brottrager
October 19, 2019

After many hours, days, and months of work, I have finished my first R package, stylcoR. It allows you to recreate the analyses I’ve conducted for my MA thesis. You can find it at here.

Please let me know if you find any bugs or if you have any suggestions about any functions I should add.

Next

The Signal and the Noise. Differentiating Stylometric Signals in the Analysis of Literary Texts
